description: Documentation similarity/checklist verifier: weighted sum of 4 categories (required_topics 0.4, file_references 0.25, data_flow 0.2, extension_points 0.15) minus hallucination penalty for invalid Go file paths. Each category item uses regex pattern matching (check_any or check_all) against documentation.md content. Hallucination penalty: up to 0.35 deducted based on ratio of non-existent Go file paths mentioned.

perfect_input.documentation.md: Placed at /workspace/documentation.md. Contains all required topic keywords (GenericAPIServer, authentication, authorization, admission, APIService/api aggregation, pkg/endpoints/installer, pkg/registry/storage, CRD/CustomResourceDefinition, admission webhook/ValidatingWebhook/MutatingWebhook), all file references (pkg/server/genericapiserver.go, pkg/admission/interfaces.go, pkg/endpoints/installer.go, pkg/registry/generic/registry.go), complete data flow (request->authentication->authorization->admission->registry/storage + rejection terms), and all extension points (APIService/aggregation layer, admission plugin/ValidatingAdmissionPolicy/webhook, CRD/CustomResourceDefinition). No invalid Go file paths used.

empty_input.documentation.md: Empty file. No patterns match, all category scores = 0.0. Final = 0.0.

scoring_notes.perfect: required_topics: t1(GenericAPIServer)=1, t2(authentication+authorization+admission)=1, t3(APIService)=1, t4(pkg/endpoints+pkg/registry)=1, t5(CRD+admission webhook)=1 -> ratio=1.0. file_references: all 4 items match -> ratio=1.0. data_flow: d1(all 5 ordered patterns)=1, d2(unauthorized/forbidden/reject)=1 -> ratio=1.0. extension_points: all 3 match -> ratio=1.0. base = 0.4*1.0 + 0.25*1.0 + 0.2*1.0 + 0.15*1.0 = 1.0. No hallucination penalty (no pkg/cmd/staging paths with .go extension that do not exist). Final = 1.0.
scoring_notes.empty: Empty file matches no patterns. All ratios = 0.0. base = 0.0. Final = 0.0.
